prompt: 你去看一下 spark go bootloader jenkins

input.command: python handover/scripts/registry_query.py spark go bootloader 2>&1 | head -50
input.description: Query registry for spark go bootloader facts

input.command: bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh jobs 2>&1 | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); [print(j['name']) for j in d['jobs'] if any(k in j['name'].lower() for k in ['spark','bootloader','g1x','gen1','go'])]"

for job in SPARK_GO_HEADPHONE_SPEAKER_FW SPARK_10_SPEAKER_FW; do
echo "===== $job ====="
bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh info "$job" "name,description,lastBuild[number,result],builds[number,result]" 2>&1 | python -c "import sys,json;
try:
  d=json.load(sys.stdin)
  print('desc:', (d.get('description') or '')[:200])
  print('lastBuild:', d.get('lastBuild'))
  bs=d.get('builds') or []
  print('rece
input.description: Get info on Spark GO / Spark 10 FW jobs

input.command:
echo "===== local search: spark go / bootloader binaries ====="
ls -la D:/mybot/release-binaries/ 2>/dev/null | head -40
echo "--- glob spark go / g1x / bootloader binaries under D:/mybot ---"
find D:/mybot -maxdepth 4 \( -iname "*spark*go*" -o -iname "*g1x*" -o -iname "*bootloader*" \) \( -iname "*.bin" -o -iname "*.hex" -o -iname "*.elf" -o -iname "*.dfu" \) 2>/dev/null | head -40
input.description: Search local disk for Spark GO bootloader binaries

input.command:
echo "===== SPARK_GO_HEADPHONE_SPEAKER_FW #149 artifacts + changeset ====="
bash handover/scripts/jenkins.sh build SPARK_GO_HEADPHONE_SPEAKER_FW 149 "number,result,artifacts[fileName,relativePath],changeSet[items[commitId,msg]]" 2>&1 | python -c "import sys,json;
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print('result:', d.get('result'))
print('artifacts:')
for a in (d.get('artifacts') or []): print('   ', a.get('re
input.description: Get Spark GO FW build 149 artifacts and changeset

input.command:
echo "===== dirs ====="
ls -la D:/mybot/release-binaries/wt-sparkgo/ 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo "--- spark10-133 ---"
ls -la D:/mybot/release-binaries/spark10-133/ 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo "===== sizes/dates of GO bootloader bins ====="
ls -la D:/mybot/git/tool/release-binaries/*GO* D:/mybot/git/tool/release-binaries/spark-go* 2>/dev/null
input.description: Inspect spark go worktree and spark10 dirs

input.command:
echo "===== search handover/notes for spark-go-Boot / STFS491 GO bootloader / 0.8.0.100 ====="
grep -rIl -i -e "spark-go-Boot" -e "GO_bootloader" -e "0.8.0.100" -e "spark go bootloader" D:/mybot/handover D:/mybot/git/tool 2>/dev/null | head -20
input.description: Search notes for spark go bootloader context
Find session notes mentioning 0.8.0.120 or enumeration

input.command: python handover/scripts/registry_query.py STFS-491 GO bootloader enumeration 2>&1 | head -40
input.description: Query registry for STFS-491 GO bootloader enumeration
Read latest session note about spark go bootloader

input.command: grep -rIl -e "0_8_0_120" -e "STFS-491-Boot_GO" -e "0.8.0.120" D:/mybot/handover D:/mybot/git/tool D:/mybot/docs 2>/dev/null | head; echo "=== context ==="; grep -rIh -B1 -A3 -e "0_8_0_120" -e "0\.8\.0\.120" D:/mybot/handover 2>/dev/null | head -40
input.description: Find creation context of 0.8.0.120 GO bootloader

input.command:
echo "=== JLink CLI 位置 ==="
ls "/c/Program Files/SEGGER/"*/JLink.exe "/c/Program Files (x86)/SEGGER/"*/JLink*.exe 2>/dev/null | head
which JLink 2>/dev/null
echo "=== 兩支 bin 是否相同(有無 debug) ==="
md5sum D:/mybot/git/tool/release-binaries/STFS-491-Boot_GO_0_8_0_120*.bin D:/mybot/git/tool/release-binaries/spark-go-Boot_0_8_0_100.bin 2>/dev/null
input.description: Check JLink CLI presence and compare bins
